title: Stacked Blocks
description: Stack your blocks and save 8 times the space! Never run out of storage again.
body:
[![BisectHosting Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYrNpKJN/images/298366e7a094585e6b8eb47d54187047cb1fd2a6.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/DugSP)
![Stacked Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UYrNpKJN/images/28fbdff482a08cd94d0873f5bc26922efe5e5e11.png)
**Maximize your storage like never before.** Compress eight blocks into one, like wooden logs, stone blocks, netherrack, bricks, and free up valuable space for your most important resources. [Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/stacked-blocks/gallery). ## 🧰 Features - Stack wooden logs, stone, cobblestone, netherrack, melons, pumpkins, and more by using lead. - Store up to 13,824 items in one simple chest, freeing up space for other resources. - Organize your resources with stacks for a cleaner, more efficient storage system.
## 🛠️ Add-ons - [Stacked Blocks: Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/stacked-blocks-farmers-delight) - Adds the ability to craft stackable blocks with rope. - [Stacked Blocks: Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/stacked-blocks-supplementaries) - Compress blocks like ash bricks, blackstone tiles, daub and more. ![Stacked Blocks Images](https://i.imgur.com/FSkNjJT.gif) [![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
[![Patreon Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Axperty) [![PayPal Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/paypal-singular_64h.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn) [![Ko-Fi Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/axperty)
